title: Bowie’s Amendment Can Save Bowie’s Law Next Week on the Assembly Floor

claims.claim_text: Bowie’s Law (AB 595) would have saved a puppy named Bowie by requiring 72-hour public notice before an animal shelter can euthanize an adoptable pet.
